crm.title: CRM
crm.description: Manage your contacts, companies, and deals

createObject.title: Create Custom Object
createObject.placeholderDescription: What is this object used for?

empty.welcomeDescription: Get started by setting up your CRM. Choose a template and configure your workspace.
empty.objectNotFoundDescription: The object you're looking for doesn't exist.

quickAccess.inboxDescription: View synced emails and link to records

google.connectDescription: Sync emails and calendar events to enrich your CRM

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.noEmailsSyncedDescription: Sync your Gmail to see emails here and automatically link them to contacts.
inbox.connectEmailDescription: Connect your Google account to sync emails and calendar events.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.noEventsScheduled: No events scheduled for this day
calendar.noEventsSyncedDescription: Sync your Google Calendar to see events here and link them to contacts.
calendar.connectCalendarDescription: Connect your Google account to sync calendar events.

activities.title: Activities
activities.adjustFiltersMessage: Try adjusting your search or filters.
activities.noActivitiesYetDescription: Activities will appear as you interact with contacts, deals, and records in your CRM.

pipeline.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
pipeline.bulkDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {count} records?

linkRecord.title: Link to Record
linkRecord.searchPrompt: Search for a {type} record to link this email to.
linkRecord.linkedNote: Linked emails will appear in the record's activity timeline.

errors.failedToSyncEmails: Failed to sync emails. Please try again.
errors.failedToSyncCalendar: Failed to sync calendar. Please try again.
errors.permissionsNeeded: Gmail permissions are insufficient. Please reconnect with full access.
errors.calendarPermissionsNeeded: Calendar permissions are insufficient. Please reconnect with full access.
errors.syncTimedOut: Sync timed out. Please try again.
errors.failedToCheckSync: Failed to check sync status. Please refresh the page.
